name: Balanced Scorecard Strategy Execution Ontology
alternateName: BSC-ONT — Strategy Maps, Perspectives & Stakeholder Alignment
description: Formalizes the Balanced Scorecard (Kaplan & Norton) as the connective tissue between VSOM strategic intent and KPI/OKR operational measurement. Includes BSC Perspectives, Strategy Maps with cause-and-effect chains, Stakeholder Alignment, Strategic Value Chain analysis, and Lifecycle Stage analysis. BSC is the natural bridge — VSOM defines Vision→Strategy→Objectives→Metrics; BSC organizes those objectives and metrics into four perspectives with C-Suite accountability via RRR roles. Part of VE-Series VSOM-SA (Strategy Analysis).
oaa:domain: Strategic Management, Performance Management, Strategy Execution

oaa:joinPatterns.name: VSOM-BSC-KPI Measurement Chain
oaa:joinPatterns.description: The golden chain: VSOM Strategy is operationalized through BSC into perspective objectives measured by KPIs. This is how VSOM MetricsComponent gets structured into balanced perspectives.
oaa:joinPatterns.joinPath: vsom:VSOMFramework → bsc:operationalizedBy → bsc:BalancedScorecard → bsc:hasPerspective → bsc:BSCPerspective → bsc:hasPerspectiveObjective → bsc:BSCObjective → bsc:measuredByKPI → kpi:KPI → kpi:quantifiedBy → kpi:Metric
oaa:joinPatterns.useCase: Strategy to measurement cascade across balanced perspectives

oaa:joinPatterns.name: BSC-RRR Accountability Bridge
oaa:joinPatterns.description: Each BSC perspective has C-Suite accountability via RRR ExecutiveRole.bscPerspective property. Objectives within each perspective inherit role ownership.
oaa:joinPatterns.joinPath: bsc:BSCPerspective → bsc:perspectiveOwnedBy → rrr:ExecutiveRole [WHERE bscPerspective matches] → rrr:raciAccountable → vsom:ObjectivesComponent
oaa:joinPatterns.useCase: Executive accountability for strategic perspective performance

oaa:joinPatterns.name: Strategy Map Causal Traversal
oaa:joinPatterns.description: Bottom-up causal chain through the Strategy Map: invest in people/technology (L&G) → improve processes (Internal) → delight customers (Customer) → grow revenue (Financial). Each link is a testable hypothesis.
oaa:joinPatterns.joinPath: bsc:StrategyMap → bsc:hasCausalChain → bsc:CausalLink [LearningAndGrowth → InternalProcess → Customer → Financial]
oaa:joinPatterns.useCase: Trace investment impact from capability building to financial outcomes

oaa:joinPatterns.name: Org-Context-BSC Full Path
oaa:joinPatterns.description: Full traversal from organization through context through VSOM to balanced scorecard
oaa:joinPatterns.joinPath: org:Organization → org:hasContext → orgctx:OrganizationContext → vsom:hasStrategicContext → vsom:VSOMFramework → bsc:operationalizedBy → bsc:BalancedScorecard

oaa:joinPatterns.name: BSC-to-OKR Cascade
oaa:joinPatterns.description: BSC perspective objectives cascade to OKR quarterly objectives with measurable key results
oaa:joinPatterns.joinPath: bsc:BSCObjective → bsc:cascadesToOKR → okr:Objective → okr:hasKeyResult → okr:KeyResult → okr:hasInitiative → okr:Initiative
oaa:joinPatterns.useCase: Strategy execution: annual BSC objectives decompose into quarterly OKR cycles

oaa:joinPatterns.name: Value Chain to BSC Internal Process
oaa:joinPatterns.description: Strategic value chain activities map to BSC Internal Process perspective objectives via EA business capabilities
oaa:joinPatterns.useCase: Connect value-creating activities to internal process measurement

oaa:joinPatterns.name: Lifecycle-BSC Emphasis Shift
oaa:joinPatterns.description: Organization lifecycle stage determines which BSC perspective receives strategic emphasis and investment priority
oaa:joinPatterns.useCase: Adaptive strategy: lifecycle stage shifts BSC focus from growth (Customer) to optimization (Financial/Internal Process)

entities.name: BalancedScorecard
entities.description: Kaplan & Norton Balanced Scorecard — translates a VSOM strategy into measurable objectives organized across four perspectives (Financial, Customer, Internal Process, Learning & Growth). Each BSC instance operationalizes exactly one VSOMFramework and is scoped to a specific organizational level (corporate, business-unit, department, team).

oaa:properties.name: vsomFrameworkRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to vsom:VSOMFramework @id being operationalized

oaa:properties.name: contextRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to orgctx:OrganizationContext @id

oaa:properties.name: scope
oaa:properties.description: Organizational level this scorecard applies to

oaa:properties.name: scopeEntityRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to specific business unit, department, or team if scope is not Corporate

oaa:properties.name: period
oaa:properties.description: Fiscal period covered (e.g. FY2026, Q1-2026)

oaa:properties.name: overallScore
oaa:properties.description: Weighted composite score across all perspectives (0-100)

oaa:properties.name: overallStatus
oaa:properties.description: Traffic-light status rollup

oaa:properties.name: strategyMapRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to bsc:StrategyMap @id visualizing cause-and-effect

entities.name: BSCPerspective
entities.description: One of four Balanced Scorecard perspectives. Each perspective contains strategic objectives measured by KPIs. C-Suite roles from RRR-ONT own perspectives based on their bscPerspective property. The four canonical perspectives form a causal chain: Learning & Growth → Internal Process → Customer → Financial. The perspectiveType enum aligns to both kpi:KPI.category and rrr:ExecutiveRole.bscPerspective.

oaa:properties.name: perspectiveType
oaa:properties.description: Canonical BSC perspective. Maps to kpi:KPI.category and rrr:ExecutiveRole.bscPerspective

oaa:properties.name: strategicTheme
oaa:properties.description: High-level strategic theme unifying objectives in this perspective (e.g. 'Profitable Growth', 'Customer Intimacy')

oaa:properties.name: weight
oaa:properties.description: Perspective weight in overall scorecard (0.0-1.0, sum across 4 perspectives = 1.0)

oaa:properties.name: perspectiveScore
oaa:properties.description: Weighted score for this perspective (0-100)

oaa:properties.name: objectiveCount
oaa:properties.description: Number of strategic objectives in this perspective (typically 3-5)

entities.name: BSCObjective
entities.description: A strategic objective within a BSC perspective. Each objective aligns to a vsom:ObjectivesComponent, is owned by an rrr:ExecutiveRole, measured by kpi:KPI instances, and can cascade to okr:Objective for quarterly execution. Objectives within a Strategy Map participate in cause-and-effect chains across perspectives.

oaa:properties.name: perspectiveType
oaa:properties.description: Which BSC perspective this objective belongs to

oaa:properties.name: vsomObjectiveRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to vsom:ObjectivesComponent @id this operationalizes

oaa:properties.name: ownerRoleRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to rrr:ExecutiveRole @id accountable for this objective

oaa:properties.name: weight
oaa:properties.description: Weight within perspective (0.0-1.0, sum within perspective = 1.0)

oaa:properties.name: targetDescription
oaa:properties.description: What success looks like for this objective

oaa:properties.name: score
oaa:properties.description: Objective achievement score (0-100)

oaa:properties.name: strategicInitiativeRefs
oaa:properties.description: References to ppm:Initiative @ids driving this objective

oaa:properties.name: okrObjectiveRefs
oaa:properties.description: References to okr:Objective @ids for quarterly cascading

oaa:properties.name: commentary
oaa:properties.description: Qualitative progress commentary from objective owner

entities.name: BSCMeasure
entities.description: A specific KPI measurement attached to a BSC objective. Bridges bsc:BSCObjective to kpi:KPI with target/actual/threshold tracking. Each objective should have 1-3 measures (leading and lagging).

oaa:properties.name: kpiRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to kpi:KPI @id

oaa:properties.name: measureType
oaa:properties.description: Leading indicators predict future performance; lagging indicators confirm past outcomes

oaa:properties.name: target
oaa:properties.description: Target value for this period

oaa:properties.name: actual
oaa:properties.description: Current actual value

oaa:properties.name: baseline
oaa:properties.description: Starting baseline value

oaa:properties.name: thresholdGreen
oaa:properties.description: On-track threshold

oaa:properties.name: thresholdAmber
oaa:properties.description: At-risk threshold

oaa:properties.name: thresholdRed
oaa:properties.description: Off-track threshold

oaa:properties.name: unit
oaa:properties.description: Measurement unit (%, $, #, days, NPS, etc.)

oaa:properties.name: polarity
oaa:properties.description: Whether improvement means going up, down, or hitting a specific target

oaa:properties.name: frequency
oaa:properties.description: Measurement frequency

oaa:properties.name: dataSourceRef
oaa:properties.description: System or data source for this measure

entities.name: StrategyMap
entities.description: Visual cause-and-effect diagram showing how BSC objectives across perspectives link together. The Strategy Map IS a directed acyclic graph flowing from Learning & Growth → Internal Process → Customer → Financial. Each causal link is a testable hypothesis: 'If we improve X (lower perspective), then Y (higher perspective) will improve.' This entity is the primary graph structure for AI agent traversal of strategic cause-and-effect.

oaa:properties.name: scorecardRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to bsc:BalancedScorecard @id

oaa:properties.name: vsomStrategyRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to vsom:StrategyComponent @id being mapped

oaa:properties.name: strategicNarrative
oaa:properties.description: The strategy story: how objectives connect to deliver on the vision

oaa:properties.name: validatedDate
oaa:properties.description: Last date causal hypotheses were reviewed

oaa:properties.name: chainCount
oaa:properties.description: Number of end-to-end causal chains in the map

entities.name: CausalLink
entities.description: A single cause-and-effect link between two BSC objectives, typically across adjacent perspectives. Forms the edges of the Strategy Map graph. Each link represents a testable strategic hypothesis: 'Improving {fromObjective} will drive improvement in {toObjective}.' Links have strength and lag-time properties to support quantitative strategy modelling.

oaa:properties.name: fromObjectiveRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to bsc:BSCObjective @id (cause)

oaa:properties.name: toObjectiveRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to bsc:BSCObjective @id (effect)

oaa:properties.name: linkType
oaa:properties.description: Strength of causal relationship

oaa:properties.name: hypothesis
oaa:properties.description: The testable hypothesis this link represents

oaa:properties.name: strength
oaa:properties.description: Evidence-based strength of the causal relationship

oaa:properties.name: lagTime
oaa:properties.description: Time delay between cause and effect

oaa:properties.name: evidenceRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to supporting data or analysis

oaa:properties.name: validated
oaa:properties.description: Whether this causal hypothesis has been empirically validated

entities.name: StakeholderAlignment
entities.description: Assessment of executive and key stakeholder alignment with strategic objectives. Maps rrr:ExecutiveRole owners to their interest, influence, and alignment posture for each BSC perspective and its objectives. Used to identify alignment gaps that could block strategy execution.

oaa:properties.name: vsomFrameworkRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to vsom:VSOMFramework @id

oaa:properties.name: scorecardRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to bsc:BalancedScorecard @id

oaa:properties.name: overallAlignmentScore
oaa:properties.description: Composite alignment score (0-100)

oaa:properties.name: criticalGaps
oaa:properties.description: Summary of critical alignment gaps requiring intervention

entities.name: StakeholderAssessment
entities.description: Individual stakeholder assessment within a StakeholderAlignment. Maps a specific rrr:ExecutiveRole or rrr:FunctionalRole to their alignment posture, interest, influence, and BSC perspective ownership.

oaa:properties.name: roleRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to rrr:ExecutiveRole or rrr:FunctionalRole @id

oaa:properties.name: roleName
oaa:properties.description: Role title for convenience

oaa:properties.name: interest
oaa:properties.description: How interested/affected this stakeholder is

oaa:properties.name: influence
oaa:properties.description: How much power this stakeholder has to support or block

oaa:properties.name: alignment
oaa:properties.description: Current alignment posture toward the strategy

oaa:properties.name: bscPerspectiveOwnership
oaa:properties.description: Primary BSC perspective this stakeholder is accountable for

oaa:properties.name: objectivesOwned
oaa:properties.description: References to bsc:BSCObjective @ids this stakeholder owns

oaa:properties.name: engagementStrategy
oaa:properties.description: Recommended engagement approach based on interest/influence/alignment

oaa:properties.name: riskIfMisaligned
oaa:properties.description: Risk to strategy execution if this stakeholder remains misaligned

entities.name: StrategicValueChain
entities.description: Porter's Value Chain applied at organizational level. Maps primary and support activities to ea:BusinessCapability, identifies margin contribution, and connects to BSC Internal Process perspective. Activities with high value contribution become focal points for BSC objectives.

oaa:properties.name: contextRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to orgctx:OrganizationContext @id

oaa:properties.name: totalRevenue
oaa:properties.description: Total revenue for margin analysis

oaa:properties.name: totalCost
oaa:properties.description: Total cost for margin analysis

oaa:properties.name: totalMargin
oaa:properties.description: Overall margin (revenue - cost)

oaa:properties.name: valueDriverSummary
oaa:properties.description: Summary of key value drivers

oaa:properties.name: veAnalysisRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to kpi:VEAnalysis @id for value engineering optimization

entities.name: ValueChainActivity
entities.description: A single activity in the strategic value chain (primary or support). Each activity maps to an ea:BusinessCapability and has measurable value and cost contributions. High-value activities become candidates for BSC Internal Process objectives.

oaa:properties.name: primaryCategory
oaa:properties.description: Porter's primary activity categories

oaa:properties.name: supportCategory
oaa:properties.description: Porter's support activity categories

oaa:properties.name: capabilityRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to ea:BusinessCapability @id

oaa:properties.name: processRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to ea:BusinessProcess @id

oaa:properties.name: valueContributionPct
oaa:properties.description: Percentage of total value creation (0-100)

oaa:properties.name: costAllocationPct
oaa:properties.description: Percentage of total cost (0-100)

oaa:properties.name: marginContribution
oaa:properties.description: Net margin contribution

oaa:properties.name: strategicRole
oaa:properties.description: Strategic role of this activity in competitive positioning

oaa:properties.name: maturityScore
oaa:properties.description: Capability maturity (1.0-5.0)

oaa:properties.name: bscObjectiveRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to bsc:BSCObjective @id tracking this activity (typically Internal Process)

entities.name: LifecycleStageAnalysis
entities.description: Strategic analysis contextualised by organization or product lifecycle stage. Different stages demand different BSC perspective emphasis, leadership focus, and metric priorities. Startup emphasizes Customer perspective (product-market fit), Growth emphasizes Customer+Financial (scaling), Maturity emphasizes Financial+Internal Process (optimization), Renewal emphasizes Learning & Growth (innovation). Connects to orgctx lifecycle types (merged from ORG-MAT).

oaa:properties.name: contextRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to orgctx:OrganizationContext @id

oaa:properties.name: lifecycleStage
oaa:properties.description: Current lifecycle stage. Aligns to orgctx lifecycle types (merged from ORG-MAT).

oaa:properties.name: dominantBSCPerspective
oaa:properties.description: Primary BSC perspective for this lifecycle stage

oaa:properties.name: strategicFocus
oaa:properties.description: What the organization should focus on at this stage

oaa:properties.name: keyMetricCategories
oaa:properties.description: Primary metric categories for this stage

oaa:properties.name: leadershipFocus
oaa:properties.description: Key C-Suite roles driving at this stage. References rrr:ExecutiveRole roleCode values.

oaa:properties.name: vsomStrategyRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to vsom:StrategyComponent @id adapted for lifecycle stage

oaa:properties.name: transitionSignals
oaa:properties.description: Signals indicating transition to next lifecycle stage

oaa:properties.name: riskFactors
oaa:properties.description: Key risks at this lifecycle stage

Startup.focus: Product-Market Fit, customer discovery, value proposition validation

relationships.name: Operationalized By BSC
relationships.description: A VSOM Framework is operationalized by a Balanced Scorecard that organizes its objectives into balanced perspectives

relationships.name: Operationalizes VSOM
relationships.description: Inverse: Balanced Scorecard operationalizes a VSOM Framework

relationships.name: Has Perspective
relationships.description: Balanced Scorecard has four perspectives

relationships.name: Has Perspective Objective
relationships.description: BSC Perspective contains strategic objectives (typically 3-5 per perspective)

relationships.name: Perspective Owned By
relationships.description: BSC Perspective is owned by C-Suite roles matching rrr:ExecutiveRole.bscPerspective

relationships.name: Objective Owned By
relationships.description: BSC Objective is accountable to a specific executive role

relationships.name: Measured By KPI
relationships.description: BSC Objective is measured by KPI instances (1-3 per objective, mix of leading and lagging)

relationships.name: Measure References KPI
relationships.description: BSC Measure references a KPI-ONT KPI for the actual metric definition

relationships.name: Objective Aligns To VSOM Objective
relationships.description: BSC Objective aligns to a VSOM ObjectivesComponent

relationships.name: Cascades To OKR
relationships.description: BSC Objective cascades to quarterly OKR objectives for execution

relationships.name: Driven By Initiative
relationships.description: BSC Objective is driven by PPM strategic initiatives

relationships.name: Has Strategy Map
relationships.description: Balanced Scorecard has a strategy map visualizing cause-and-effect

relationships.name: Has Causal Link
relationships.description: Strategy Map contains causal links between objectives

relationships.name: Cause Objective
relationships.description: Causal link originates from this BSC objective (the cause)

relationships.name: Effect Objective
relationships.description: Causal link points to this BSC objective (the effect)

relationships.name: Has Stakeholder Alignment
relationships.description: Balanced Scorecard has an associated stakeholder alignment assessment

relationships.name: Has Stakeholder Assessment
relationships.description: Stakeholder Alignment contains individual stakeholder assessments

relationships.name: Assesses Role
relationships.description: Stakeholder assessment evaluates a specific executive or functional role

relationships.name: Has Value Chain
relationships.description: Organization context has a strategic value chain analysis

relationships.name: Has Activity
relationships.description: Strategic value chain contains activities

relationships.name: Activity Maps To Capability
relationships.description: Value chain activity maps to an EA business capability

relationships.name: Activity Tracked By Objective
relationships.description: Value chain activity performance is tracked by a BSC objective (typically Internal Process perspective)

relationships.name: Has Lifecycle Analysis
relationships.description: Organization context has a lifecycle stage analysis

relationships.name: Emphasizes Perspective
relationships.description: Lifecycle stage analysis identifies which BSC perspective should receive strategic emphasis

relationships.name: Lifecycle Shapes Strategy
relationships.description: Lifecycle stage analysis shapes which VSOM strategy is appropriate

businessRules.name: BSC Must Have Four Perspectives
businessRules.action: THEN it MUST have exactly four BSCPerspective instances: Financial, Customer, Internal Process, and Learning & Growth

businessRules.name: BSC Must Reference VSOM Framework
businessRules.action: THEN vsomFrameworkRef MUST reference a valid vsom:VSOMFramework @id

businessRules.name: Perspective Weights Must Sum to 1.0
businessRules.action: THEN the sum of all four perspective weights MUST equal 1.0

businessRules.name: Perspective Must Have Objectives
businessRules.action: THEN it MUST have at least one BSCObjective (recommended 3-5)

businessRules.name: Objective Must Have Owner
businessRules.action: THEN ownerRoleRef MUST reference a valid rrr:ExecutiveRole @id

businessRules.name: Objective Must Have Measure
businessRules.action: THEN it MUST have at least one BSCMeasure via measuredByKPI relationship

businessRules.name: Measure Must Reference KPI
businessRules.action: THEN kpiRef MUST reference a valid kpi:KPI @id

businessRules.name: Strategy Map Causal Direction
businessRules.condition: IF a CausalLink is created in a StrategyMap
businessRules.action: THEN fromPerspective SHOULD be at a lower BSC level than toPerspective (Learning & Growth → Internal Process → Customer → Financial). Cross-perspective or same-perspective links are allowed but SHOULD be flagged as non-standard.

businessRules.name: Objective Weight Sum Within Perspective
businessRules.condition: IF BSCObjective.weight values are specified within a BSCPerspective
businessRules.action: THEN the sum of objective weights within that perspective MUST equal 1.0

businessRules.name: Perspective Owner Must Match RRR bscPerspective
businessRules.condition: IF a perspectiveOwnedBy relationship is created
businessRules.action: THEN the rrr:ExecutiveRole.bscPerspective property SHOULD include the BSCPerspective.perspectiveType value

businessRules.name: BSCObjective Must Align to VSOM
businessRules.action: THEN vsomObjectiveRef MUST reference a valid vsom:ObjectivesComponent @id

businessRules.name: Measure Polarity Consistency
businessRules.action: THEN thresholdGreen MUST be >= thresholdAmber >= thresholdRed

businessRules.name: Stakeholder Alignment Coverage
businessRules.condition: IF a StakeholderAlignment assessment is created
businessRules.action: THEN it SHOULD include assessments for all rrr:ExecutiveRole instances with bscPerspective ownership

businessRules.name: Value Chain Activity Must Be Categorized
Lifecycle Stage Must Set Dominant Perspective
businessRules.action: THEN dominantBSCPerspective MUST be specified based on lifecycle stage

changeControl.changeNotes: Initial release of BSC-ONT as part of VE-Series VSOM-SA (Strategy Analysis). Formalizes the Balanced Scorecard as the bridge between VSOM strategic intent and KPI/OKR measurement. Includes Strategy Maps, Stakeholder Alignment, Strategic Value Chain, and Lifecycle Stage Analysis. Cross-references VSOM-ONT v3.0.0, KPI-ONT v1.0.0, OKR-ONT v2.0.0, RRR-ONT v4.0.0, ORG-ONT v3.0.0, ORG-CONTEXT-ONT v3.0.0, EA-CORE-ONT v1.0.0, PPM-ONT v4.0.0.
